description: The Nuvoletta clan was a powerful Neapolitan Camorra clan operating from Marano di Napoli, Italy. Founded in the 1960s by Lorenzo and Angelo Nuvoletta, it was affiliated with Sicilian Mafia families and considered one of the most powerful Camorra clans between the 1970s and 1990s. The clan engaged in racketeering, drug trafficking, and fraud, and was succeeded by the Polverino and Orlando clans after its decline.
